message:
feat(ffs-tui): implement minimal TUI dashboard via ftui (bd-23r)

DashboardSnapshot DTO for cache/MVCC/scrub metrics, Dashboard model
implementing ftui::Model with three-panel layout (ARC Cache, MVCC,
Scrub/Repair), quit on q/Q/Esc, and 12 tests.
